name: Intelligence before generation
description: Research, opportunity, positioning, and recipe resolution happen before build generation.

name: Prompt objects with lineage
description: Prompts carry source basis, target slot, constraints, variants, QA, and status.

name: Preview is not proof
description: Runnable preview is evidence but does not prove deploy, auth, DB, security, or production readiness.

name: Guarded checkpoints
description: Checkpoints track proof and resume state, but do not require Fritz approval unless stop conditions trigger.

name: Branch/PR proof packet
description: Agent work lands as branch/PR with proof, risks, commands, and rollback note.

name: Capability Truth before autonomy
description: Capability means handler plus last probe plus proof plus fallback plus cost/approval rule.

name: Component/slot mutation
description: Classify changes and use smallest safe component/slot mutation instead of page rewrites.

name: Media Library as active registry
description: Assets track prompt lineage, variants, approvals, allowed slots, usage, fallbacks, and QA.

name: Server strangler modularization
description: Map responsibilities, extract one module at a time, prove no behavior drift.
